The versions form a sorted boolean array: [false, false, ..., true, true, ...]. You need to find the first true.
Binary search is ideal: check the midpoint. If it's bad, search left (including mid). If good, search right.
Use left < right as the loop condition, and set right = mid (not mid - 1) when mid is bad.
Be careful with integer overflow when computing mid. Use left + (right - left) / 2.
